rationale: The total amount (1,750,000) requires department head approval due to the amount-based approval control. Since the requester team is overloaded and wants to avoid rework and coordination overhead, creating a single purchase request for the full amount minimizes the number of approval steps and back-and-forth. The facts about the amount and approval thresholds support this choice, and the system enforced controls will ensure appropriate approval routing and segregation of duties.
